name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: CRO_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the following campaign data and provide suggestions to improve conversion rates: {campaign_data}
prompts.use_case: Improving e-commerce conversion rates using AI-driven CRO techniques

prompts.name: copywriting_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Create compelling marketing copy based on this brief: {content_brief}
prompts.use_case: Generating engaging marketing copy for multi-channel campaigns

prompts.name: seo_recommendation_prompt
prompts.template: Suggest SEO improvements and keyword integration strategies for these keywords: {seo_keywords}
prompts.use_case: Enhancing SEO with AI-curated keyword recommendations and content optimization

prompts.name: analytics_report_prompt
prompts.template: Generate a detailed report analyzing the following marketing analytics data: {analytics_data}
prompts.use_case: Analyzing marketing campaign data to identify trends and optimize budgets

prompts.name: growth_plan_prompt
prompts.template: Develop a growth engineering plan aimed at improving these metrics: {growth_metrics}
prompts.use_case: Designing and executing growth engineering implementations to accelerate user acquisition
